metadata.title: Zümra Academy | Online Language Education for Women
metadata.description: Zümra Academy offers a safe, high-quality and fully online language learning experience designed for women.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist.
notFound.help: Check the address or return to the home page.

emptyState.title: Coming Soon
emptyState.description: This module is currently being prepared.

publicAssessment.title: See where you are and make your next step clear.
publicAssessment.description: Complete a short assessment, discover your level and request a consultation with our expert advisors if you wish.
publicAssessment.genericError: The action could not be completed right now. Check your information and try again.
publicAssessment.expired: Your seven-day continuation period has expired. You can start a new assessment.

start.title: First, let us get to know you.
start.description: These details create your candidate record and let you begin immediately.
start.consent: I consent to the processing of my information for candidacy, level assessment and communication. If I am under 18, I confirm that I provide this information with my guardian's knowledge and approval.
start.marketing: I would like to receive news and announcements by email.
start.privacyNote: Your email is not used to create an account. It is added to your candidate profile for communication and application tracking.

profile.title: Your result is ready.
profile.description: Complete your contact information to unlock your result and see the most useful next step.

result.title: Your current level is {level}
result.description: This demo assessment provides an initial indication of your level. A consultation helps define the right program for your goals.

appointment.title: Choose three times that suit you.
appointment.description: These are availability preferences, not confirmed appointments. Our advisor will use them to plan with you.
appointment.successDescription: Our advisor team will review your availability and contact you.

emptyDashboard.description: When the real modules are ready, they will open inside the same workspace shell, animation system and role-based data model.

hero.description: Move at your own pace in our safe women-only online environment; focus on your goals and build your language skills with confidence. Flexible schedules and expert instructors create a fresh learning experience.
hero.quoteDescription: A purely supportive, women-exclusive space designed to amplify your voice.

why.title: Forget traditional courses.
why.description: At Zümra Academy, learning is not a technical obligation. It is a safe, joyful and personal growth journey.

cards.title: A Safe Space for Women
cards.description: A women-only online learning environment where you can feel comfortable, learn without judgment and build confidence without unnecessary stress.

cards.title: Flexible Hours
cards.description: Join from home, at the time that fits your life. Camera-off participation keeps the experience fully compatible with your rhythm.

cards.title: Active Speaking Practice
cards.description: Lessons focused on real communication, not endless grammar rules. With small groups and one-to-one support, you do not just learn the language, you use it.

how.description: From day one, you know exactly what to expect. No surprises, only focused steps toward your goal.

steps.title: Pre-Registration & First Contact
steps.desc: Fill out the form. We will contact you within 24 hours to plan the next step.

steps.title: Free Level Assessment
steps.desc: A short, relaxed 15-minute evaluation to understand your current level.

steps.title: Your Personalized Program
steps.desc: Together, we define the roadmap that fits your level and your goals.

steps.title: Start Live Lessons
steps.desc: Join live classes on safe platforms with flexible scheduling.

steps.title: Progress Tracking
steps.desc: Stay motivated with monthly progress reports and clear feedback.

languages.title: Choose the language that fits you.
languages.description: One-to-one and group options across 8 languages.

items.title: General English
items.desc: Designed for women who want to speak confidently in everyday life. Practice-first and goal-oriented.

items.title: Academic English
items.desc: Academic writing, presentation and exam skills for university and professional goals.

items.title: English Speaking Club
items.desc: Keep your speaking skills active through a supportive and social practice environment.

items.title: Business English
items.desc: Improve email writing, presentations and meeting communication for work life.

cta.title: Not sure which program is right for you?
cta.description: After a short free consultation with our expert advisors, we will create a route designed around your goals.

instructors.title: An inspiring team of strong women educators.
instructors.description: Meet our elite instructors, each an expert in her field with strong academic experience. They teach language and also mentor your growth.

items.name: Elif A.
items.text: Being able to feel comfortable without turning on the camera mattered a lot to me. I genuinely found the courage to speak in class.

items.name: Selin K.
items.text: Everything is planned and I get clear feedback every month. Knowing what I am doing keeps my motivation high.

items.name: Hande N.
items.text: My instructor noticed my gaps very quickly. The practice analysis system helped me feel stronger and closer to my goal.

items.name: Nil T.
items.text: The lessons are very smooth. The content matched my goal, and I built a speaking habit in a short time. Zümra is the best.

faq.title: Let's clarify what you are wondering.
faq.description: For more questions, feel free to reach us through our WhatsApp line.

items.a: Yes. Every month, we offer free demo lessons for those who want to try our group classes. We also organize seminars to support motivation.
All materials are provided on our online platform. We support your learning with practical and interactive content for daily and professional life.

items.q: Which platform are lessons held on?
items.a: Lessons are held live and interactively on Zoom or Google Meet. A computer or tablet is enough.

items.q: Can I join without a camera?
items.a: Absolutely. To help women feel fully comfortable, students may join lessons with audio only if they prefer.

footer.description: Türkiye's first women-only online language academy. Learn at your own pace, reach your goal and speak with the world.

students.title: Students
students.description: {count} students are managed in the mock system.

timelineNotes.speakingPractice: The student was highly successful in everyday speaking practice. Vocabulary variety is improving noticeably. There are still small mistakes with past tense usage, which will be reinforced.
timelineNotes.grammarFocus: The student understood the grammar structure, but had some difficulty turning it into speech. An additional reading passage was sent.

studentDetail.lesson12Note: The student was highly successful in everyday speaking practice. Vocabulary variety is improving noticeably. There are still small mistakes with past tense usage, which will be reinforced.
studentDetail.lesson11Note: The student understood the grammar structure, but had some difficulty turning it into speech. An additional reading passage was sent.

leads.title: Candidates
leads.description: Manage every potential student, application and level assessment in one pool, whether enrolled or not.
leads.noCandidatesDescription: Candidates created by public forms or staff entry will appear here.
leads.enrollmentActionDescription: Open the separate enrollment wizard while preserving candidate history.
leads.enrollmentCompletedDescription: Candidate history was preserved and a student profile was created.
leads.enrollmentStartError: The enrollment draft could not be opened. Please try again.
leads.noTimeline: No activity has been recorded yet.

activities.created_from_public_assessment: Candidate created from the public level assessment

enrollment.title: Student Enrollment
enrollment.saveError: This step could not be saved. Check the required fields.
enrollment.incomplete: Enrollment could not be completed. Check missing or inconsistent fields.
enrollment.completeError: Enrollment could not be completed. Please try again.
enrollment.documentError: The document could not be uploaded.

stepDescriptions.1: Identity numbers are encrypted and only shown in masked form.
stepDescriptions.2: At least one guardian is required for students under 18.
stepDescriptions.3: Until the program catalog is available, the name and course model are stored as a snapshot.
stepDescriptions.4: The original source is preserved and any operational correction is stored separately.
stepDescriptions.5: Specify whether registration was taken in the office, by phone, online or elsewhere.
stepDescriptions.6: Attach identity, passport, receipt and contract files to private media storage.
stepDescriptions.7: All amounts are stored in TRY with kuruş precision.
stepDescriptions.8: Group schedules may be inherited; private lesson schedules can be completed later.
stepDescriptions.9: Review missing information and complete the conversion in one transaction.

fields.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep the existing masked value
fields.correctedSourcePlaceholder: Enter an operational source correction if needed
fields.schedulePlaceholder: Suitable days, time ranges or notes for the instructor...
fields.confirmationPasswordPlaceholder: Enter your password to confirm this critical action

enrollment.minorGuardianRequired: The student is under 18. Add at least one contract party as guardian.
enrollment.studentContractParty: The promissory note and contract will be issued in the student's name.
enrollment.noParties: No additional party has been added.
enrollment.programModuleNote: The real program and class selector will be connected here by the Programs module.
enrollment.reviewSummary: {parties} contract parties and {documents} documents will be linked to the enrollment.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Track lesson schedules, consultation appointments and events from this calendar.

instructors.description: Manage your instructor team and assign lesson schedules from this module.

programs.title: Programs
programs.description: Create and manage your education programs from this module. It will be active soon.

messages.description: Student and instructor communication will live here with notifications and messaging support.

settings.description: General settings, notification preferences and account management will live here.

payments.billingDescription: March 2026 invoices are ready to be issued.

reports.title: Performance Reports
reports.growthTrend: Student growth in the last quarter

dashboard.encouragement: You are doing great, keep going!

messages.title: Messages

googleAccount.title: Connected Accounts
googleAccount.description: Use your Google account only for faster, secure sign-in.
googleAccount.linkedSuccess: Your Google account was connected securely.
googleAccount.unlinkedSuccess: The Google account connection was removed.
googleAccount.actionError: The action could not be completed. Check your password and the email address on your Google account, then try again.

dashboard.title: Advisor Panel
dashboard.description: The base CRM shell is ready for assigned candidates, students, meetings and offers.

leads.title: My Candidates
leads.description: The candidate pool assigned to this advisor will be managed here with the CRM flow.

students.title: My Students
students.description: Student profiles, offers, meetings and follow-up flow for this advisor will live here.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.description: Links, QR codes, reminders and meeting statuses will be managed in this module.

offers.title: Offers
offers.description: The offer flow sent to students through email and WhatsApp will be prepared here.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Student and candidate communication history will be collected here in a single flow.

settings.title: Advisor Settings
settings.description: Notification preferences, working hours and profile settings will be managed here.

dashboard.title: Teacher Panel
dashboard.description: The teacher workspace shell is ready for lessons, students, calendar and messaging.

students.title: Students
students.description: Students assigned to the teacher and lesson progress notes will appear here.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: The teacher's lesson schedule, availability and meetings will be managed here.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Student messages, lesson notes and notification flows will live here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Teacher specialties, lesson settings and profile details will be edited here.

settings.title: Teacher Settings
settings.description: Notification, calendar and account preferences will be managed here.

login.title: Sign in to the workspace
login.description: Start a secure session with your Zümra account.
login.googleError: This Google account could not be used to sign in. If you have a Zümra account, sign in with your username and password, then connect Google from your profile.
login.rateLimited: Too many verification requests were sent. Please try again in a few minutes.
login.error: Your sign-in details could not be verified.

googleCompletion.title: Verifying your Google account
googleCompletion.description: Keep this window open while the secure connection is completed.
googleCompletion.pending: Your Google account and Zümra membership are being verified...
googleCompletion.error: The Google action could not be completed. Redirecting you to sign in.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email address associated with your account. If it exists, a secure reset link will be sent.
forgotPassword.success: If this email is registered, a reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.error: The request could not be completed right now. Please try again later.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.description: Create a new password with at least 12 characters.
resetPassword.sameAsCurrent: Your new password must be different from your current password.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to sign in.
resetPassword.error: The link is invalid, already used, or expired.

activation.title: Activate your account
activation.description: Set a password of at least 12 characters to complete your invitation.
activation.error: The invitation link is invalid or has expired.
activation.success: Your account is active. Redirecting to sign in.

device.title: Verify this device
device.description: Enter the six-digit code sent to your email. This device will remain trusted for 30 days.
device.error: The code is invalid or has expired.

mfa.title: Two-step verification
mfa.description: Enter the current code from your authenticator app.
mfa.error: The code could not be verified.

mfaSetup.title: Set up admin MFA
mfaSetup.description: Configure authenticator verification before opening the admin workspace. Recovery codes are shown only once.
mfaSetup.error: MFA setup could not be completed.

unauthorized.title: Access could not be verified
unauthorized.description: The required role or security verification is missing for this workspace.
unauthorized.help: Refresh your session or contact your system administrator.
